scripts.preinstall: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); try{fs.unlinkSync('package-lock.json')}catch(e){} try{fs.unlinkSync('yarn.lock')}catch(e){} const ua=process.env.npm_config_user_agent||''; if(!ua.startsWith('pnpm/')){console.warn('Recommend using pnpm, continuing anyway')}"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
